title: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Hispanic/Latino Community 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Deafness Hispanic/Latino Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES MADRAS LATINO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers intensive outpatient treatment for alcohol and drug recovery and non-pharmacological approaches to pain management. 236 SE D Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Outpatient treatment: By appointment only Email (541) 475-5300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL CITY CONCERN PUENTES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers supportive services to the Latino/a/e and Hispanic communality and non-English speakers seeking healing and recovery. Provides bilingual/bicultural alcohol and drug treatment and mental health services, case management, mentoring, access and referral to housing resources, continuing care when treatment is finished, and if necessary referrals for medical, psychiatric, and holistic. Treatment plans are individually tailored and offered by clinicians and staff that share clients' cultural background and language. Treatment address conditions like depression, anxiety, trauma, and other life stressors. Plans include behavioral health services such as Mental health care Group counseling, individual counseling, outpatient addiction treatment, recovery groups, peer support case management, DUII treatment. Eligibility: Individuals who are: -Latinx (monolingual/bilingual) -Adults (over 18 years of age) in need of mental health counseling, substance abuse and/or DUII treatment Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 546-9975 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD EUGENE MAIN OFFICE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides recovery services for alcohol and substance abuse, gambling, and other addictions. Early intervention classes for youth who have received minor-in-possession are also available. Treatment by phone or telehealth. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Recovery Center Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Other services by appointment only Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SPRINGFIELD EDUCATION OFFICE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & EDUCATION SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide individual and group therapy for individuals seeking treatment for addictions, including problem gambling. Also provide peer, educational, and prevention services for adults, youth, and families. 1621 Centennial Boulevard Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: 11am-9pm Monday-Friday (541) 686-8483 2 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES
